installCommand: if [ -f frontend/package.json ]; then npm install --prefix frontend; elif [ -f ../frontend/package.json ]; then npm install --prefix ../frontend; else echo 'frontend/package.json not found'; exit 1; fi
buildCommand: if [ -f frontend/package.json ]; then npm run build --prefix frontend && rm -rf dist && cp -R frontend/dist dist; elif [ -f ../frontend/package.json ]; then npm run build --prefix ../frontend && rm -rf dist && cp -R ../frontend/dist dist; else echo 'frontend/package.json not found'; exit 1; fi
